name: Nasu Karashi Sumiso-ae (Eggplant w/ Mustard & Miso Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant in half lengthwise, then crossways into 4 pieces.
2. Cube each piece into 4-inch cubes.
3. Bring 3/4 pint of water to boil in a small saucepan.
4. Add salt and drop in the eggplant. Boil for 3-5 minutes.
5. Drain and let cool.
6. Pat the cubes dry.
7. To assemble and serve: Put the miso, soy sauce, and wasabi into a mixing bowl and stir until well blended.
8. Add the eggplant and toss until well coated.
9. Serve at room temperature.
